summary: Energetic first set highlighted by a fiery Ramble On Rose and a spooky second set, captured in an undefined but listenable recording.
review: The show is praised as a quintessential MSG experience, with the first‑set Ramble On Rose delivering high energy and a second set that feels delightfully spooky. Reviewers gave it five stars, indicating strong performance, though they did not comment on the technical side of the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (5‑star) praising the musical performance; no information on recording quality, so rating leans heavily on show quality with limited confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided by reviewers.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for its energetic Ramble On Rose; second set described as spooky, suggesting a compelling overall flow.
